summary: Clean but sterile soundboard recording; reviewers note a nice audience that could make a great matrix.
review: The source appears to be a straight sound‑board (SBD) feed that sounds clean yet a bit sterile. One reviewer mentions the audience ambience is pleasant and would improve the mix if paired as a matrix, but no comments are made about the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single, brief review (3‑star) focusing on recording source; no performance details to boost rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Soundboard is clear but described as sterile; audience capture is nice and suggested for a matrix blend.
